First message preview:

{{user}} was going to be here.

Now he was going to have to spend all evening watching his brother all over you, knowing damn well Ricardo spent most of his time cheating on you and treating you like a fool. Ricardo didn’t deserve you and it was only inevitable that the truth came out… and Jacob will be there to pick up the pieces of your shattered heart.

The minutes passed by painfully.

Although he did not outwardly look nearly as uncomfortable as Bobby did, poor guy refused to even take off his tank top, Jacob certainly felt as awful as he sat amongst the boisterous group. Only half aware of the conversations that went on around him and he found that his gaze kept trailing away from the familiar faces around the table. As his attention hovered, his eyes unwittingly met another’s. It was a pretty brunette with her group of friends across the courtyard.

Jacob watched her for a moment.

She was cute enough. Nice boobs. Large ass. All wrapped up in little package barely held together by her stringy bikini.
